chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1554 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case (Priority) 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For orders on CMA 2422/25 3.For hearing of CMA 7492/21 4.For hearing of main case 27-05-2025 Mr. Muhammad Habib Khan, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Abdul Aziz Shaikh, Advocate for respondent No.10(a). Syed Israr Ahmed Shah, Advocate for respondent No.10. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G. **** Counsel for petitioners, under instructions, does not press the instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
